name: inflynce-create-campaign
tagline: BOOST any link with Inflynce Marketing—reward real users by Mindshare
description: Inflynce Marketing lets anyone boost a link (tweet, website, cast) with USDC and reward real Farcaster users by Mindshare. Each campaign: 0.25 USDC fee, minimum budget 5 USDC. Create via postBoostWeb API. No custody of funds.
